operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date, start_time DateTime, duration Int32, value Float64);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDate('2023-01-01'), toDateTime('2023-01-01 08:00:00'), 120, 99.99);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, toDate('2023-02-01'), toDateTime('2023-02-01 14:30:00'), 240, 250.00);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (3, toDate('2023-03-01'), toDateTime('2023-03-01 20:00:00'), 60, NULL);
SELECT id, changeHour(start_time, 15) AS updated_time FROM test_dates WHERE updated_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-02-01 08:00:00') AND toDateTime('2023-02-01 17:00:00');
SELECT id, changeHour(event_date, 12) AS updated_date FROM test_dates WHERE updated_date NOT BETWEEN toDate('2023-02-01') AND changeHour('2019-01-01', 12);

SELECT id, value, changeHour(start_time, CASE WHEN value < 100 THEN 14 ELSE 18 END) AS modified_time FROM test_dates WHERE modified_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-01-01 10:00:00') AND changeHour(toDateTime('2023-01-02 10:00:00'), 12);
SELECT id, duration, COUNT(*) OVER() AS count_records FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NULL AND duration NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 300;

WITH (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS avg_value SELECT id, changeHour(start_time, 5) AS new_time FROM test_dates WHERE new_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00') AND now() AND avg_value NOT BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_dates WHERE value > 200);
CREATE TABLE test_dates_v2 AS SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NULL);
INSERT INTO test_dates_v2 SELECT id, changeHour(event_date, 3), start_time, duration, value FROM test_dates;
